translation: to arrive, come, reach; to bring up, bring over; to gather together
to pass, pass by, go; to pass on, hand; to spend (time); to happen

to stay, remain, be left; to be (indicating location)
to leave, abandon; to let, allow

to win, gain, earn, get, acquire
to bring; to get, fetch; to carry

to get, obtain; to achieve, attain
to explain; to expound (a theory); to lecture on (a subject)
to touch; to play (an instrument, music)
to reach, catch, catch up to, catch up with
